changelog:
- Version 4.2-FireFlies Patch
🚀 New Features
 * Google Filament 3D Engine Integration: Added support for high-performance 3D rendering using Google Filament and gltfio libraries.
 * 3D Live Wallpapers: Implemented CaveArtFilamentService to allow .glb 3D models to be set directly as Android Live Wallpapers.
 * In-App 3D Preview: Introduced FilamentTextureController within the WallpaperDetailScreen for real-time 3D model interaction inside the Jetpack Compose UI.
 * Smart Model Handling: Added dynamic logic to automatically scale, center, and rotate 3D models.
 * Enhanced Lighting: Configured directional lighting and skybox environments.
 * Experimental Core: Integrated Filament as a primary testing tool.
⚡ Performance & Optimization
 * Resource Handling: Disabled automatic density-based upscaling.
 * Memory Pressure Fix: Implemented a strict scaleToFit pass in BitmapHelper.
 * UI Fluidity: Resolved performance drops and lag specifically associated with the "3D Pop" effect when using internal app wallpapers.
🛠️ Bug Fixes
 * Native Stability: Fixed native C++ library initialization issues.
